Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Nanotwinned precipitates induced ultra-strong AlCoCrFeNi_{2.1} eutectic high-entropy alloy through additive manufacturing

Composition_Info.Note: Powder composition from LangFeng Material Technology Co., Ltd. As-built sample composition measured by STEM-EDS.

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized AlCoCrFeNi2.1 powder (particle sizes 15-53 μm, average 31.5 μm) fabricated by PBF-LB using EOS M100 system (200W fiber laser, 40 μm spot diameter). Optimized parameters: laser power 100W, scan speed 1000 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.05 mm, layer thickness 0.02 mm. Build platform: 304 stainless steel without preheating. High-purity argon atmosphere (<1000 ppm oxygen). Build plate dimensions 40 mm × 8 mm × 4 mm. Each layer rotated 67° relative to previous layer.
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-LB using EOS M100; P=100W, v=1000mm/s, h=0.05mm, t=0.02mm, spot=40μm, no preheating, Ar atmosphere

Process_Info.Equipment: EOS M100 Laser-sintering system with 200W fiber laser

Microstructure_Text.original: Dual-phase hierarchical microstructure with predominant B2 phase (83.6 vol%) and minor FCC phase (16.4 vol%). Nano-lamellar colonies in heat-affected zone composed of alternating FCC and ordered B2 nanolayers with K-S orientation relationship. Cellular colonies within melt pools with BCC/B2 subgrains (avg 800 nm) encapsulated by FCC interfacial nanolayer (~14 nm) with N-W orientation relationship. High dislocation density from rapid solidification. Spinodal decomposition observed in B2 colonies showing biconinuous Ni-Al-rich and Co-Cr-Fe-rich nanostructures.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: B2-dominant dual-phase hierarchical structure (B2: 83.6%, FCC: 16.4%); alternating nanolamellae in HAZ with K-S OR; cellular colonies in MP with N-W OR; spinodal decomposition in B2 phase

Properties_Info.Note: As-built sample, perpendicular to building direction
As-built sample, perpendicular to building direction
Uniform elongation; as-built sample, perpendicular to building direction
Reported as 568.8 HV for B2-dominated EHEA

Composition_Info.Note: As-built sample composition; as-annealed samples subjected to 600°C for 8h post-heat treatment. NT nanoprecipitates composition measured by APT: ~Co24.4Cr24.4Fe24.4Ni24.4Al2.4 at.%.

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized AlCoCrFeNi2.1 powder fabricated by PBF-LB using EOS M100 system (optimized parameters: laser power 100W, scan speed 1000 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.05 mm, layer thickness 0.02 mm). Post-heat treatment at 600°C for 8h in muffle furnace followed by water quenching.
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-LB (EOS M100, P=100W, v=1000mm/s, h=0.05mm, t=0.02mm) + aging at 600°C for 8h (water quench)

Process_Info.Equipment: EOS M100 Laser-sintering system; muffle furnace for heat treatment

Microstructure_Text.original: Multiple-order hierarchical multiphase architecture after annealing. Nano-lamellar and cellular eutectic colonies retained with slight coarsening. High-density needle-like nanoprecipitates (avg ~180 nm length, ~20 nm diameter) in B2 phases with volume fractions of 20% (lamellar) and 45% (cellular). Type I precipitates (>20 nm width): FCC structure with ultrafine nanotwins (twin thickness 0.4-16 nm, avg 2.4 nm). Type II precipitates (<10 nm width): HCP structure with stacking faults (SF spacing 0.4-2.9 nm, avg 1.1 nm). 76% needle-like precipitates are FCC-type. L12 ordered precipitates in FCC phase. NT FCC and HCP precipitates are semi-coherent with B2 matrix.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: B2 matrix with high-density NT needle-like nanoprecipitates (20% in lamellar, 45% in cellular colonies); Type I: FCC with 2.4 nm avg twin thickness; Type II: HCP with 1.1 nm avg SF spacing; 76% FCC-type precipitates

Properties_Info.Note: As-annealed sample (600°C for 8h), perpendicular to building direction; ~24% higher than as-built
As-annealed sample (600°C for 8h), perpendicular to building direction; ~24% higher than as-built; highest reported for AlCoCrFeNi2.1 EHEA
As-annealed sample tensile strength at 600°C; surpasses most additively manufactured metals for intermediate-temperature applications
Uniform elongation; as-annealed sample, comparable ductility to as-built despite much higher strength
Uniform elongation at 600°C for as-annealed sample

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Calculated contribution from NT precipitates via Orowan bowing mechanism
Properties_Info.Note: Strengthening contribution from NT FCC precipitates; Δσorw-modified ~565 MPa using K=1.47 (aspect ratio h~8.75), M~2.71, G~57 GPa, b~0.248 nm, λp~64 nm
